risks.title: Coded slices lack reproducible acceptance evidence
risks.trigger: A coded slice has no executable acceptance mapping or exact revision.
risks.mitigation: Complete the P1 verification packets before new feature construction.

risks.title: Release outcomes and stakeholder win conditions conflict
risks.trigger: Gate reviewers use incompatible success criteria or release boundaries.
risks.mitigation: Record win conditions, conflicts, authority, and measurable pilot outcomes.

risks.title: Shared contracts diverge across coded slices
risks.trigger: Slices use incompatible identity, revision, relationship, or status semantics.
risks.mitigation: Record variances and accept versioned contracts at LCA.

risks.title: Access controls expose information through derived views
risks.trigger: A derived view, log, error, or provenance path reveals information outside the viewer's authority.
risks.mitigation: Analyze direct and derived access and add denial and omission tests.

risks.title: Mutable state or weak revision semantics corrupt history
risks.trigger: Plans, work, decisions, learning, or completion are overwritten rather than superseded or derived.
risks.mitigation: Accept immutable event and revision rules plus migration and recovery evidence.
retirement_evidence: Passing history tests in P3-D02 and P5-D03

risks.title: Outcome interpretation overstates causation or completeness
risks.trigger: A deliverable or improved measure is presented as proven outcome achievement or attribution.
risks.mitigation: Verify separation of measurement, interpretation, success conditions, and attribution confidence.

risks.title: Documentation, contracts, tests, and code drift apart
risks.trigger: Behavior changes without corresponding traceability, contract, acceptance, or ledger updates.
risks.mitigation: Run both validators in CI and require evidence references for accepted deliverables.

risks.title: Missing Slice 3 prevents a coherent end-to-end workflow
risks.trigger: Slice 4 requires deliverable or work evidence that cannot be produced from Slice 2 plans.
risks.mitigation: Prioritize Slice 3 after LCA and verify Slices 2 through 4 together.

risks.title: Over-generalized platform work delays user evidence
risks.trigger: A phase adds frameworks or extensions that do not retire its dominant risks.
risks.mitigation: Use thin slices, explicit non-goals, and keep Slices 6 and 7 deferred until justified.
retirement_evidence: Gate records tie scope to dominant risks
IOC reached without unauthorized extension scope

risks.title: Operational usability and support assumptions fail in the pilot
risks.trigger: Users cannot complete the workflow, understand provenance, recover work, or obtain support.
risks.mitigation: Require usability review, runbooks, monitoring, rollback, support, and bounded stop conditions.
retirement_evidence: IOC decision based on pilot evidence
